message:
refactor(conformance): overhaul scenario harness with setup merging, shared context, and parity improvements

Major improvements to both the Rust-side conformance test runner and the
TypeScript oracle harness to improve parity coverage and reduce duplication.

tests/ext_conformance/ts_harness/run_scenario.ts:
- Extract buildScenarioContext(): centralized context factory replacing three
  inline context object literals (tool, command, event handlers). Adds full
  ui mock (select/confirm/dialog with response overrides), theme stub,
  modelRegistry.getApiKeyForProvider mock, and sessionManager
- Add mergeScenarioSetup(): merges per-scenario setup.mock_exec and
  setup.mock_http rules into the base mock spec, supporting dynamic test
  fixtures. Includes VCR stub image support (vcr_or_stub mode generates a
  minimal PNG base64 response for image-generating extensions)
- Add normalizeScenarioResult(): per-scenario output normalization for known
  environment-dependent scenarios (scn-inline-bash-001 cwd replacement,
  scn-subagent-001 available agents normalization)
- Expand HTTP mock matching: rules can now use url_contains for partial URL
  matching alongside exact url match, and method is optional (matches any)
- Expand MockSpec: http default_response now accepts headers; http rules
  accept url_contains field
- Expand ScenarioInput: add id and setup fields for per-scenario mock config
- Add flag/shortcut/registration scenario kinds (registration-only, no exec)
- Defer loader import to inside try block (lazy import)

tests/ext_conformance_scenarios.rs:
- Use ExtensionPolicyMode::Permissive with cleared deny_caps when loading
  extensions in conformance tests, via the new
  start_with_interceptor_and_policy() method
- Add pi_mono_coding_agent_node_modules() to NODE_PATH for TS oracle,
  resolving missing module errors for extensions that import from
  coding-agent dependencies
- Pass scenario id and setup fields to TS oracle via stdin JSON
- Add savedPath null normalization: treat absent vs explicit null as
  equivalent for optional fields that one runtime emits but the other omits
- Refactor parity_runner: replace per-kind inline load_extension +
  execute_{tool,command,event}_scenario calls with unified run_scenario()
  call, eliminating ~60 lines of duplicated match arms
- Move registration-only skip check (provider, tool-without-name) before
  Rust execution to avoid unnecessary work
- Remove known_env_diffs workaround list (scn-subagent-001) since TS-side
  normalization now handles the environment-dependent output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
